subject: session date
fact: The session date is Dec 7th, 2025.
source_quote: Date: Dec 7th, 2025

subject: The Waydown
fact: The Waydown is a familiar sinkhole located a half-day's journey from Hillsfar.
source_quote: The party returned to the familiar sinkhole known as The Waydown, a half-day's journey from Hillsfar

subject: The Waydown entrance
fact: A partially built wall now surrounds the entrance to The Waydown.
source_quote: they found a partially built wall surrounding the entrance

subject: Two Red Plume soldiers
fact: Two nervous soldiers in splint armor are guarding the entrance to The Waydown.
source_quote: guarded by two nervous soldiers in splint armor

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral is the commander of the Red Plumes who returned to Hillsfar.
source_quote: Their commander, Vuhm Yestral, had returned to the city

subject: Red Plumes
fact: A larger contingent of the Red Plumes accompanied Vuhm Yestral back to the city.
source_quote: returned to the city with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes

subject: Owlbear companion
fact: The party enhanced the Owlbear companion with magical gloves to make its attacks more powerful.
source_quote: They enhanced their Owlbear companion with magical gloves that would make its attacks more powerful

subject: enchanted goggles
fact: Daein purchased a pair of enchanted goggles to see in the darkness.
source_quote: Daein, the only member of the party without natural darkvision, finally purchased a pair of enchanted goggles

subject: Daein
fact: Daein is the only party member without natural darkvision.
source_quote: Daein, the only member of the party without natural darkvision

subject: descent into Underdark
fact: The party descended a hundred-foot drop to a swift-flowing underground river.
source_quote: they descended the hundred-foot drop to the swift-flowing underground river

subject: journey to Howling Pits
fact: The party began a two-day journey to the Howling Pits.
source_quote: began their two-day journey to the Howling Pits

subject: Murssvayas
fact: Murssvayas provided accurate directions and a map for the journey.
source_quote: guided by Murssvayas's accurate directions and map

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The party detected a faint piping sound echoing through the caves as they approached the Howling Pits.
source_quote: As they approached the Howling Pits, they detected a faint piping sound echoing through the caves

subject: fire giants
fact: Two massive fire giants ambushed the party in a large cave within the Howling Pits.
source_quote: the party was suddenly ambushed by two massive fire giants who leaped from behind stalactites

subject: winged fire giant
fact: One of the fire giants possessed leathery wings too small for flight.
source_quote: one possessed leathery wings too small for flight

subject: cyclopean fire giant
fact: One of the fire giants had an extra eye.
source_quote: while the other had an extra eye

subject: Felkur's spell failure
fact: Felkur attempted to strike a giant with magic, but the attack was ineffective.
source_quote: Felkur attempted to strike one with magic, but the attack proved remarkably ineffective

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned radiant guardians to protect the party and create an aura that slowed the giants.
source_quote: Bramgrim positioned himself strategically and summoned radiant guardians to protect the party, creating an aura that slowed the giants' movements

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim was struck by a critical blow and fell unconscious and bleeding.
source_quote: one of the giants landed a critical blow that sent Bramgrim crashing to the ground, unconscious and bleeding

subject: Daein
fact: Daein grabbed the fallen Bramgrim to help him disengage from combat.
source_quote: Daein grabbed the fallen Bramgrim

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas helped Felkur disengage from combat.
source_quote: while Akritas helped Felkur

subject: party retreat
fact: The party made the decision to flee the combat with the fire giants.
source_quote: The party quickly realized they were outmatched and made the difficult decision to flee

subject: giants mocking retreat
fact: The giants laughed mockingly at the party's retreat.
source_quote: The giants laughed mockingly at their retreat

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim regained consciousness after the fight, confused and shaken.
source_quote: After Bramgrim regained consciousness, confused and shaken by what had happened

subject: stealth bypass plan
fact: Bramgrim suggested using stealth to bypass the giants rather than engaging them directly.
source_quote: Bramgrim suggested using stealth to bypass the giants rather than engaging them directly

subject: Akritas' masking spell
fact: Akritas wove a spell that would mask the party's movements.
source_quote: Akritas wove a spell that would mask their movements

subject: party sneaking past giants
fact: The party managed to sneak past the giants successfully.
source_quote: the party managed to sneak past the giants successfully

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur stumbled while the party was sneaking past the giants.
source_quote: despite a stumble from Felkur

subject: saving companions from stirring giant
fact: Akritas and Daein swiftly pulled their companions to safety when one giant briefly stirred.
source_quote: with Akritas and Daein swiftly pulling their companions to safety when one giant briefly stirred

subject: pit-filled section
fact: The party encountered a treacherous section filled with dangerously deep pits.
source_quote: a treacherous section filled with dangerously deep pits

subject: Daein grants flight
fact: Daein used his magical abilities to grant himself flight.
source_quote: Daein used his magical abilities to grant himself flight

subject: party crossing pits
fact: Daein transferred each party member across the hazardous terrain one by one.
source_quote: then transferred each party member across the hazardous terrain one by one

subject: wide cave with river
fact: The party reached a wide cave bisected by a swift-flowing underground river.
source_quote: They soon reached a wide cave bisected by a swift-flowing underground river

subject: Cave Creepers
fact: Strange gray and white fungi covering the banks were identified as Cave Creepers.
source_quote: the fungi were Cave Creepers

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas failed to identify the fungus on the river banks.
source_quote: When Akritas attempted to identify the fungus, she failed

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim explained that Cave Creepers would drive anyone mad if touched.
source_quote: Bramgrim smugly explained that the fungi were Cave Creepers, which would drive anyone mad if touched

subject: flying over river
fact: The party decided to fly over the river to avoid the fungi.
source_quote: The party carefully discussed their options and decided to fly over the river

subject: Daein transfers party over river
fact: Daein used his powers to transfer everyone across the river while avoiding contact with the fungi.
source_quote: with Daein once again using his powers to transfer everyone across while meticulously avoiding contact with the dangerous fungi

subject: yellow mold tunnel
fact: The party entered a tunnel peppered with patches of yellow mold.
source_quote: the party entered a tunnel peppered with patches of yellow mold

subject: wind picking up
fact: The wind suddenly picked up in the yellow mold tunnel, threatening to spread poisonous spores.
source_quote: the wind suddenly picked up, threatening to spread the poisonous spores into the air

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas identified the yellow mold spores as toxic.
source_quote: Akritas recognized the danger just in time, identifying the spores as toxic

subject: party holding breath
fact: The party decided to hold their breath and rush through the affected area.
source_quote: The party decided to hold their breath and rush through the affected area

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim suffered some effects from the poison despite his natural resistance.
source_quote: Bramgrim, despite his natural resistance, suffered some effects before ultimately overcoming them

subject: poison cleared
fact: The wind carried the poison away, making the area safe to continue.
source_quote: Once the wind carried the poison away, they were safe to continue

subject: tight passageway
fact: The tunnel narrowed to a tight passageway with high ceilings.
source_quote: The tunnel eventually narrowed to a tight passageway with high ceilings

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim refused to lead the way through the narrow passage.
source_quote: Bramgrim refused to lead the way

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim pointed out that the narrow passage would be an ideal place for an ambush from above.
source_quote: pointing out that it would be an ideal place for an ambush from above

subject: Daein
fact: Daein spotted bat-like creatures lurking in the shadows above using his keen observation skills.
source_quote: Daein spotted bat-like creatures lurking in the shadows above

subject: cloakers
fact: Akritas identified the creatures as cloakers.
source_quote: Akritas identified them as cloakers

subject: cloakers
fact: Cloakers are mysterious and intelligent predators of the Underdark.
source_quote: mysterious and intelligent predators of the Underdark

subject: cloakers
fact: Cloakers descended from above to attack their prey.
source_quote: that descended from above to attack their prey

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas wove her spell of concealment.
source_quote: Akritas wove her spell of concealment

subject: party movement
fact: The party carefully crept through the narrow passage.
source_quote: the party carefully crept through the narrow passage

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur made a misstep.
source_quote: Despite another misstep from Felkur

subject: cloaker evasion
fact: The party successfully evaded the cloakers without being detected.
source_quote: they successfully evaded the cloakers without being detected

subject: edge of the cave
fact: The party reached the edge of the cave.
source_quote: the party reached the edge of the cave

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The party prepared to continue deeper into the Howling Pits.
source_quote: prepared to continue deeper into the Howling Pits

subject: fire giant encounter
fact: The party was forced to flee from the fire giants.
source_quote: forced to flee from the fire giants

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim protested as Akritas and Daein grabbed him to flee from the fire giants.
source_quote: Protesting as Akritas and Daein grab him to flee from the fire giants

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim said, "There will be no dwarf tossing!"
source_quote: "There will be no dwarf tossing!"

subject: Bramgrim unconscious
fact: Bramgrim was knocked unconscious by a critical hit from a fire giant.
source_quote: Bramgrim is knocked unconscious by a critical hit from a fire giant

subject: Bramgrim damage
fact: The critical hit from the fire giant dealt seventy-four points of damage in a single blow.
source_quote: dealing seventy-four points of damage in a single blow

subject: party flight
fact: The devastating attack forced the party to flee from the encounter.
source_quote: The devastating attack forces the party to flee from the encounter

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim smugly explained Cave Creepers to Akritas after she failed her nature check.
source_quote: Smugly explaining Cave Creepers to Akritas after she failed her nature check

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim stated, "I don't know. I never wanted to say this, but you know, it's not that you're a surface dweller. I'm an Underdark creature, and I can tell these mushrooms even if you couldn't."
source_quote: "I don't know. I never wanted to say this, but you know, it's not that you're a surface dweller. I'm an Underdark creature, and I can tell these mushrooms even if you couldn't."

subject: Felkur catapult failure
fact: Felkur rolled a natural one on his Catapult spell against a fire giant.
source_quote: Felkur rolls a natural one on his Catapult spell against a fire giant

subject: Felkur damage
fact: Felkur's spell dealt only four points of damage.
source_quote: dealing only four points of damage

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas rolled a natural twenty on initiative.
source_quote: Akritas and Daein both roll natural twenties on initiative

subject: Daein
fact: Daein rolled a natural twenty on initiative.
source_quote: Akritas and Daein both roll natural twenties on initiative

subject: companion rescue
fact: Akritas and Daein swiftly grabbed their companions to escape the fire giants.
source_quote: swiftly grab their companions to escape the fire giants

subject: The Waydown
fact: The party returned to The Waydown, a familiar sinkhole entrance to the Underdark.
source_quote: The party returns to The Waydown, a familiar sinkhole entrance to the Underdark

subject: soldiers
fact: Two nervous soldiers were guarding a newly constructed wall at The Waydown.
source_quote: encounter two nervous soldiers guarding a newly constructed wall

subject: soldiers
fact: The soldiers were wearing splint armor with shields, longswords, and short bows.
source_quote: soldiers in splint armor with shields, longswords, and short bows

subject: Red Plumes
fact: The soldiers mentioned their commander, Vuhm Yestral, has returned to the city with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes.
source_quote: returned to the city with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral is the commander of the soldiers at The Waydown.
source_quote: their commander, Vuhm Yestral

subject: soldier patrol history
fact: The soldiers explained that a patrol used to go down once a day to clear the area of threats.
source_quote: a patrol used to go down once a day to clear the area of threats

subject: soldiers
fact: The soldiers stated they have never ventured below and have no desire to.
source_quote: they themselves have never ventured below and have no desire to

subject: party descent
fact: The party descended into the sinkhole.
source_quote: The party descends into the sinkhole

subject: underground river
fact: The sinkhole leads to a swift-flowing underground river one hundred feet below.
source_quote: leads to a swift-flowing underground river one hundred feet below

subject: journey duration
fact: The journey to the Howling Pits took approximately two days.
source_quote: takes approximately two days

subject: Murssvayas
fact: Murssvayas provided accurate directions and a map for the journey.
source_quote: guided by Murssvayas's accurate directions and map

subject: Underdark
fact: The party entered the Underdark, characterized by natural formations, increasing patches of fungus, and perpetual darkness.
source_quote: characterized by natural formations, increasing patches of fungus, and perpetual darkness

subject: Underdark travel
fact: The party traversed rough and less worn tunnels and caves, continuously enveloped in darkness.
source_quote: traverse rough and less worn tunnels and caves, continuously enveloped in darkness

subject: Underdark encounter
fact: For the first time, the party encountered no problems during their journey through the Underdark.
source_quote: encounters no problems during their journey through the Underdark

subject: magical gloves
fact: The party decided to craft magical gloves for the Owlbear that grant a plus one bonus to attack and damage.
source_quote: decide to craft magical gloves for the Owlbear that grant a plus one bonus to attack and damage

subject: magical gloves
fact: The crafting of the gloves costs one hundred gold pieces.
source_quote: costs one hundred gold pieces

subject: Goggles of Night
fact: Daein purchased Goggles of Night for two hundred gold pieces.
source_quote: Daein purchases Goggles of Night for two hundred gold pieces

subject: darkvision acquisition
fact: The Goggles of Night finally granted Daein darkvision like the rest of the party.
source_quote: finally granting him darkvision like the rest of the party

subject: Daein
fact: The party joked about Daein being the only one without darkvision before his purchase.
source_quote: The party jokes about Daein being the only one without darkvision

subject: Daein
fact: Everyone glared at Daein before his purchase.
source_quote: with everyone glaring at him before his purchase

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear companion has abilities including extra attack, multi-attack, improved critical, and increased proficiency bonus.
source_quote: abilities as a sidekick, including extra attack, multi-attack, improved critical, and increased proficiency bonus

subject: glove crafting completion
fact: The crafting of the gloves was completed during downtime before the expedition.
source_quote: completed during downtime before the expedition

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The party enters a large, dark cave within the Howling Pits.
source_quote: Upon entering a large cave within the Howling Pits

subject: Mutated Fire Giant with wings
fact: One mutated Fire Giant has leathery wings.
source_quote: One has leathery wings

subject: Mutated Fire Giant with extra eye
fact: One mutated Fire Giant has an extra eye.
source_quote: the other has an extra eye

subject: Ambush initiation
fact: Two Fire Giants leap from behind stalactites and attack the party.
source_quote: Two Fire Giants leap from behind stalactites, screaming as they attack

subject: Felkur's Catapult spell
fact: Felkur casts Catapult at one of the giants but deals only four points of damage.
source_quote: Felkur casts Catapult at one of the giants, but rolls extremely poorly, dealing only four points of damage

subject: First giant attacks Bramgrim
fact: The first giant strikes Bramgrim twice with its greatsword.
source_quote: The first giant moves forward and strikes Bramgrim twice with its greatsword

subject: Daein's Protective Field
fact: Daein uses his Protective Field reaction to reduce the damage to Bramgrim by four points.
source_quote: Daein uses his Protective Field reaction to reduce the damage to Bramgrim by four points

subject: Owlbear attacks giant
fact: The Owlbear attacks the first giant with its magical claws, landing one hit for eighteen points of damage.
source_quote: The Owlbear attacks the first giant with its magical claws, landing one hit for eighteen points of damage

subject: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians at fifth level, creating a radiant aura that halves the giants' speed.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians at fifth level, creating a radiant aura that affects both giants and halves their speed

subject: Second giant knocks Bramgrim unconscious
fact: The second giant critically strikes Bramgrim with its greatsword, dealing seventy-four points of damage and knocking him unconscious.
source_quote: The second giant critically strikes Bramgrim with its greatsword, dealing seventy-four points of damage and knocking him unconscious

subject: Party flees
fact: The party decides to disengage and flee, with Daein carrying the unconscious Bramgrim.
source_quote: the party decides to disengage and flee, with Daein carrying the unconscious Bramgrim

subject: Giants resume resting
fact: The giants laugh at the retreating party and return to lying down in their cave.
source_quote: The giants laugh at the retreating party and return to lying down in their cave

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim regains consciousness and asks what happened.
source_quote: Bramgrim regains consciousness and asks what happened

subject: Party plans stealth
fact: Bramgrim suggests using Akritas's Pass Without Trace spell to sneak through the area.
source_quote: Bramgrim suggests using Akritas's Pass Without Trace spell to sneak through the area

subject: Bramgrim healing
fact: Bramgrim regains forty-one hit points during a short rest.
source_quote: Bramgrim regains forty-one hit points

subject: Akritas casts Pass Without Trace
fact: Akritas casts Pass Without Trace, and the party attempts to sneak past the giants.
source_quote: Akritas casts Pass Without Trace, and the party attempts to sneak past the giants

subject: Felkur fails stealth check
fact: Felkur rolls a natural one on stealth, stumbling and stubbing his toe.
source_quote: Felkur rolls a natural one, stumbling and stubbing his toe

subject: Party rescued from stealth fail
fact: Akritas and Daein grab Bramgrim and Felkur and pull them to safety.
source_quote: Akritas and Daein, who both rolled natural twenties on initiative, quickly grab Bramgrim and Felkur and pull them to safety

subject: Giant notices disturbance
fact: One giant notices the disturbance and screams in frustration, thrusting its sword into the ground before lying back down to sleep.
source_quote: One giant notices the disturbance and screams in frustration, thrusting its sword into the ground before lying back down to sleep

subject: Party escapes to cave edge
fact: The party successfully escapes to the edge of the cave without further incident.
source_quote: The party successfully escapes to the edge of the cave without further incident

subject: Deep Pits section
fact: The party arrives at a section of the Howling Pits littered with dangerously deep pits from which winds howl relentlessly.
source_quote: The party arrives at a section of the Howling Pits littered with dangerously deep pits from which winds howl relentlessly

subject: Daein casts Fly
fact: Daein uses his mandolin to cast Fly on himself.
source_quote: Daein uses his mandolin to cast Fly on himself

subject: Party crosses pits
fact: Daein uses his power to transfer everyone across the pits.
source_quote: uses his power to transfer everyone across the pits

subject: Party crosses wind checks
fact: All party members successfully make acrobatics or athletics checks to maintain control against the strong winds.
source_quote: All party members, including Bramgrim and the Owlbear, successfully make their checks and safely cross the pits

subject: River of Cave Creepers cave
fact: The tunnel opens into a wide cave with an underground river fifteen feet wide cutting through it.
source_quote: The tunnel opens into a wide cave with an underground river fifteen feet wide cutting through it

subject: Cave Creeper fungus
fact: Strange gray and white fungus grows in large patches on the banks of the dark, swift-flowing river.
source_quote: Strange gray and white fungus grows in large patches on the banks of the dark, swift-flowing river

subject: Fungus identification failed
fact: Akritas and Daein fail to identify the fungus with nature checks.
source_quote: Akritas attempts to identify the fungus with a nature check but fails, as does Daein when he tries to help

subject: Bramgrim identifies Cave Creeper
fact: Bramgrim successfully identifies the fungus as Cave Creeper.
source_quote: Bramgrim, drawing on his knowledge as an Underdark creature, successfully identifies the fungus as Cave Creeper

subject: Cave Creeper effect explained
fact: Bramgrim explains that Cave Creeper is a fungus that will drive anyone mad if they touch it.
source_quote: Bramgrim explains that Cave Creeper is a fungus that will drive anyone mad if they touch it

subject: Daein scouts ahead
fact: Daein casts Fly on himself using his mandolin and scouts ahead, identifying a northern passageway as a viable route.
source_quote: Daein casts Fly on himself using his mandolin and scouts ahead, identifying a northern passageway as a viable route

subject: Party crosses river
fact: The party uses Daein's power to transfer everyone across the river one by one, carefully avoiding the Cave Creeper fungus.
source_quote: The party uses Daein's power to transfer everyone across the river one by one, carefully avoiding the Cave Creeper fungus

subject: Yellow Mold tunnel
fact: The party enters a tunnel peppered with patches of yellow mold throughout the lowest tunnels of the Howling Pits.
source_quote: The party enters a tunnel peppered with patches of yellow mold throughout the lowest tunnels of the Howling Pits

subject: Wind spreads mold spores
fact: A sudden wind picks up, threatening to spread the poisonous spores of the mold.
source_quote: A sudden wind picks up, threatening to spread the poisonous spores of the mold

subject: Akritas identifies spores
fact: Akritas successfully identifies the spores as poisonous with a nature check, recognizing they will form a cloud with the winds.
source_quote: Akritas successfully identifies the spores as poisonous with a nature check, recognizing they will form a cloud with the winds

subject: Party holds breath
fact: The party decides to hold their breath and make Constitution saving throws to pass through the affected area.
source_quote: The party decides to hold their breath and make Constitution saving throws to pass through the affected area

subject: Party resists poison
fact: Daein, Akritas, and the Owlbear successfully resist the poison.
source_quote: Daein, Akritas, and the Owlbear successfully resist the poison

subject: Bramgrim takes poison damage
fact: Bramgrim fails his initial save and takes eleven points of damage.
source_quote: Bramgrim, despite being resistant to poison, fails his initial save and takes eleven points of damage

subject: Bramgrim succeeds second save
fact: Bramgrim makes a second saving throw and succeeds, preventing further effects.
source_quote: Bramgrim makes a second saving throw and succeeds, preventing further effects

subject: Party immune to fumes
fact: After the wind carries the poison away, the party becomes immune to the poisonous fumes in that area.
source_quote: After the wind carries the poison away, the party becomes immune to the poisonous fumes in that area

subject: Silver Shadow Cave
fact: The Silver Shadow Cave is located in Elventree and serves as the starting point of the party's current expedition.
source_quote: specifically at the Silver Shadow Cave

subject: Elventree
fact: Elventree is a known location where the party begins their journey.
source_quote: A known location where the party begins their journey

subject: The Waydown
fact: The Waydown is a sinkhole located a half-day's journey from Hillsfar.
source_quote: A sinkhole located a half-day's journey from Hillsfar

fact: The Waydown serves as a familiar entrance to the Underdark.
source_quote: serving as a familiar entrance to the Underdark

subject: The Waydown
fact: The Waydown is now partially surrounded by a wall and guarded by soldiers.
source_quote: It is now partially surrounded by a wall and guarded by soldiers

subject: The Waydown
fact: The sinkhole descends one hundred feet to a swift-flowing underground river.
source_quote: The sinkhole descends one hundred feet to a swift-flowing underground river

subject: Underdark
fact: The Underdark is a vast subterranean realm characterized by natural formations, increasing patches of fungus, and perpetual darkness.
source_quote: A vast subterranean realm characterized by natural formations, increasing patches of fungus, and perpetual darkness

subject: travel to Howling Pits
fact: The party travels through rough and less worn tunnels and caves for two days to reach the Howling Pits.
source_quote: The party travels through rough and less worn tunnels and caves for two days to reach the Howling Pits

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The Howling Pits are known for tunnels varying between ten to thirty feet wide and just as tall.
source_quote: tunnels varying between ten to thirty feet wide and just as tall

subject: Howling Pits
fact: A maddening, howling wind is ever-present in the Howling Pits, masking sounds more than seventy-five feet away.
source_quote: A maddening, howling wind is ever-present, masking sounds more than seventy-five feet away

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The Howling Pits contain large caves, treacherous deep pits, an underground river, and various dangerous fungi and creatures.
source_quote: The area contains large caves, treacherous deep pits, an underground river, and various dangerous fungi and creatures

subject: Fire Giant Cave
fact: The Fire Giant Cave is a large, dark cave within the Howling Pits where two mutated fire giants ambushed the party.
source_quote: A large, dark cave within the Howling Pits where two mutated fire giants ambushed the party

subject: Fire Giant Cave
fact: The giants hide behind stalactites in the Fire Giant Cave.
source_quote: The giants hide behind stalactites

subject: Deep Pits Section
fact: The Deep Pits Section is a treacherous part of the Howling Pits littered with dangerously deep pits.
source_quote: A treacherous section of the Howling Pits littered with dangerously deep pits

subject: flying over Deep Pits
fact: The party had to fly across the Deep Pits Section to avoid falling.
source_quote: The party had to fly across this area to avoid falling

subject: Underground River Cave
fact: The Underground River Cave is a wide cave in the Howling Pits bisected by a fifteen-foot wide, swift-flowing underground river.
source_quote: A wide cave in the Howling Pits, bisected by a fifteen-foot wide, swift-flowing underground river

subject: Underground River Cave
fact: The banks of the Underground River Cave are covered in strange gray and white fungi known as Cave Creepers.
source_quote: Its banks are covered in strange gray and white fungi known as Cave Creepers

subject: Cave Creepers
fact: Cave Creepers are fungi that can drive people mad if touched.
source_quote: that can drive people mad if touched

source_quote: A tunnel within the Howling Pits peppered with patches of poisonous yellow mold

fact: The party had to navigate the Yellow Mold Tunnel by holding their breath to avoid the toxic cloud of spores.
source_quote: the party had to navigate by holding their breath

subject: Cloaker Tunnel
fact: The Cloaker Tunnel is a narrow passageway within the Howling Pits that constricts to only five feet wide in places.
source_quote: A narrow passageway within the Howling Pits that constricts to only five feet wide in places

subject: Cloaker Tunnel
fact: The ceiling of the Cloaker Tunnel rises to thirty feet.
source_quote: with a ceiling rising to thirty feet

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim refuses to lead the party through the narrow passage.
source_quote: Bramgrim refuses to lead the party through the narrow passage

fact: Bramgrim points to Daein and suggests he go first.
source_quote: pointing to Daein and suggesting he go first

fact: Bramgrim expresses concern that the tight passageway with high ceilings would be an ideal place for an ambush from above.
source_quote: Bramgrim expresses concern that the tight passageway with high ceilings would be an ideal place for an ambush from above

fact: Bramgrim suggests that Akritas cast Pass Without Trace again.
source_quote: Bramgrim suggests that Akritas cast Pass Without Trace again

fact: Daein uses his investigation skills and rolls a twenty-four.
source_quote: Daein uses his investigation skills and rolls a twenty-four

fact: Daein spots bat-like creatures lurking in the tunnel.
source_quote: spotting bat-like creatures lurking in the tunnel

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas identifies the creatures as cloakers.

fact: Akritas casts Pass Without Trace.
source_quote: Akritas casts Pass Without Trace

fact: The entire party rolls high on their stealth checks after Akritas casts Pass Without Trace.

fact: The party successfully sneaks past the cloakers, avoiding a dangerous encounter.
source_quote: The party successfully sneaks past the cloakers, avoiding a dangerous encounter

fact: The party reaches the edge of the cave safely.

subject: Murssvayas
fact: Murssvayas provided the party with accurate directions and a map for their journey through the Underdark.
source_quote: An individual who provided the party with accurate directions and a map for their journey

subject: Murssvayas
fact: Murssvayas's directions led the party directly to their destination without problems.
source_quote: The directions proved reliable, leading the party directly to their destination without problems

subject: Red Plume Soldiers
fact: Two nervous guards in splint armor, shields, longswords, and short bows are stationed at The Waydown.
source_quote: Two nervous guards in splint armor, shields, longswords, and short bows stationed at The Waydown

subject: Red Plume Soldiers
fact: The Red Plume soldiers recognize the party as the heroes who saved Hillsfar from demonic possession.
source_quote: They recognize the party as the heroes who saved Hillsfar from demonic possession

subject: Red Plume Soldiers
fact: The Red Plume soldiers express their reluctance to venture into the Underdark themselves.
source_quote: They express their reluctance to venture into the Underdark themselves

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral is the commander of the Red Plumes.
source_quote: The commander of the Red Plumes

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral previously helped a group of adventurers in the Underdark.
source_quote: who previously helped a group of adventurers in the Underdark

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral has returned to Hillsfar with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes.
source_quote: He has since returned to Hillsfar with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral left only two soldiers to guard The Waydown.
source_quote: leaving only two soldiers to guard The Waydown

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is the party's animal companion and martial sidekick.
source_quote: The party's animal companion and martial sidekick

subject: Magical Gloves (Owlbear)
fact: The Owlbear is enhanced with magical gloves that grant a plus one bonus to attack and damage.
source_quote: Enhanced with magical gloves that grant a plus one bonus to attack and damage

subject: Magical Gloves (Owlbear)
fact: The magical gloves make the Owlbear's claw attacks magical.
source_quote: The gloves make the Owlbear's claw attacks magical

subject: Magical Gloves (Owlbear)
fact: The magical gloves provide a plus one bonus to both attack rolls and damage.
source_quote: provide a plus one bonus to both attack rolls and damage

subject: Magical Gloves (Owlbear)
fact: The magical gloves were crafted for the Owlbear at a cost of one hundred gold pieces.
source_quote: crafted for the Owlbear at a cost of one hundred gold pieces

subject: Owlbear combat
fact: The Owlbear participates in combat, attacking fire giants with its magical claws.
source_quote: attacking fire giants with its magical claws

subject: Owlbear navigation
fact: The Owlbear successfully navigates environmental hazards throughout the journey.
source_quote: successfully navigating environmental hazards throughout the journey

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: Two mutated fire giants are encountered in a large cave within the Howling Pits.
source_quote: Two fire giants encountered in a large cave within the Howling Pits

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: The mutated fire giants show clear signs of madness.
source_quote: showing clear signs of madness

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: One mutated fire giant possesses leathery wings too small for flight.
source_quote: One possesses leathery wings too small for flight

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: The other mutated fire giant has an extra eye.
source_quote: while the other has an extra eye

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: The mutated fire giants are aggressive and powerful, capable of devastating attacks with their greatswords.
source_quote: They are aggressive and powerful, capable of devastating attacks with their greatswords

subject: fire giant retreat
fact: After the party fled, the giants laughed and returned to lying down in their cave.
source_quote: After the party fled, the giants laughed and returned to lying down in their cave

subject: Cloakers
fact: Cloakers are mysterious and intelligent bat-like predators of the Underdark.
source_quote: Mysterious and intelligent bat-like predators of the Underdark

subject: Cloakers
fact: Cloakers lurk in narrow tunnels with high ceilings.
source_quote: that lurk in narrow tunnels with high ceilings

subject: Cloakers
fact: Cloakers descend from above to attack their prey.
source_quote: They descend from above to attack their prey

subject: Cloakers
fact: Cloakers use darkvision to hunt.
source_quote: using darkvision to hunt

subject: Goggles of Night
fact: Daein purchased the Goggles of Night for two hundred gold pieces before descending into the Underdark.
source_quote: purchased by Daein for two hundred gold pieces before descending into the Underdark

subject: Goggles of Night
fact: The Goggles of Night grant the wearer darkvision.
source_quote: The goggles grant the wearer darkvision

subject: Daein's Mandolin
fact: Daein's Mandolin is a magical musical instrument used to cast spells.
source_quote: A magical musical instrument used by Daein to cast spells

subject: Daein's Mandolin
fact: The Mandolin can grant the Fly spell to a creature.
source_quote: It can grant the Fly spell to a creature

subject: Daein's Mandolin
fact: The Mandolin cannot cast the same spell again until the next dawn.
source_quote: cannot cast the same spell again until the next dawn

subject: flight grant
fact: Daein used the Mandolin to grant himself flight.
source_quote: Daein used it to grant himself flight

subject: party transfer
fact: Daein relied on his own powers to transfer the rest of the party across dangerous terrain.
source_quote: relied on his own powers to transfer the rest of the party across dangerous terrain

subject: Catapult spell cast
fact: Felkur cast the Catapult spell against one of the mutated fire giants during the ambush.
source_quote: A spell cast by Felkur against one of the mutated fire giants during the ambush

subject: Catapult damage
fact: The Catapult spell dealt only four points of damage to the giant.
source_quote: dealing only four points of damage to the giant

subject: Protective Field activation
fact: Daein used the Protective Field ability to protect Bramgrim from the fire giant's attacks.
source_quote: used by Daein to protect Bramgrim from the fire giant's devastating attacks

subject: Protective Field effect
fact: The Protective Field reduces incoming damage by four points.
source_quote: it reduces incoming damage by four points

subject: Bramgrim knocked unconscious
fact: A fire giant's critical hit knocked Bramgrim unconscious.
source_quote: knocked Bramgrim unconscious

subject: Spirit Guardians cast
fact: Bramgrim cast the Spirit Guardians spell at fifth level during the fire giant encounter.
source_quote: A powerful spell cast by Bramgrim at fifth level during the fire giant encounter

subject: Spirit Guardians effect
fact: Spirit Guardians creates a radiant aura with a fifteen-foot radius that harms enemies and halves their movement speed.
source_quote: creates a radiant aura with a fifteen-foot radius around the caster that harms enemies and halves their movement speed

subject: Bramgrim positioning
fact: Bramgrim positioned himself to affect both giants before being knocked unconscious.
source_quote: Bramgrim positioned himself strategically to affect both giants before being knocked unconscious

subject: Pass Without Trace cast
fact: Akritas cast the Pass Without Trace spell multiple times throughout the journey.
source_quote: cast by Akritas multiple times throughout the journey

subject: Pass Without Trace bonus
fact: Pass Without Trace grants a plus ten bonus to Stealth checks for the entire party.
source_quote: grants a plus ten bonus to Stealth checks for the entire party

subject: sneaking past giants
fact: The party successfully sneaked past the fire giants after their initial defeat using Pass Without Trace.
source_quote: allowing them to successfully sneak past the fire giants after their initial defeat

subject: evading cloakers
fact: The party evaded the cloakers in the narrow tunnel using Pass Without Trace.
source_quote: later evade the cloakers in the narrow tunnel

subject: Fly spell cast
fact: Daein cast the Fly spell using his magical mandolin.
source_quote: A spell cast by Daein using his magical mandolin

subject: Fly spell duration
fact: The Fly spell has a duration of one hour and requires concentration.
source_quote: granting flight with a duration of one hour and requiring concentration

subject: Daein scouting
fact: Daein used the Fly spell on himself to scout ahead.
source_quote: Daein used it on himself to scout ahead

subject: obstacle navigation
fact: Daein navigated dangerous terrain including deep pits and the underground river.
source_quote: navigate dangerous terrain including deep pits and the underground river

subject: mutated fire giants
fact: Mutated fire giants ambushed the party.
source_quote: mutated fire giants during the ambush

subject: Cave Creeper fungi
fact: The underground river is filled with Cave Creeper fungi.
source_quote: underground river filled with Cave Creeper fungi

subject: cloakers
fact: Cloakers were encountered in a narrow tunnel.
source_quote: evade the cloakers in the narrow tunnel
